---
title: "Lecture Notes"
---

::: {.lecture-list}
### Introduction {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 01: Introduction to Robot Learning](01-introduction-to-robot-learning.qmd)<br>

### Movement Primitives {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 02: Dynamic Movement Primitives](02-dynamic-movement-primitives.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 03: Learning Stable Dynamical Systems](03-stable-dynamical-systems.qmd)<br>

### Latent Variable Models {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 04: Autoencoders](04-autoencoders.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 05: Variational Autoencoders](05-variational-autoencoders.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 06: Geometric Autoencoders](06-geometric-autoencoders.qmd)<br>

### Generative Models for Robot Learning {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 07: Brownian Motion and Wiener Process](07-brownian-motion-and-wiener-process.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 08: Stochastic Differential Equations](08-stochastic-differential-equations.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 09: Score-Based Generative Models](09-score-based-generative-models.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 10: Diffusion Models and Diffusion Policy](10-diffusion-models-and-diffusion-policy.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 11: Neural ODEs](11-neural-odes.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 12: Flow Matching for Robot Policy Learning](12-flow-matching-and-flow-matching-policy.qmd)<br>

### Optimal Control and Reinforcement Learning {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 13: Continuous-Time Optimal Control](13-continuous-time-optimal-control.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 14: Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman Equations](14-hamilton-jacobi-bellman-equations.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 15: Discrete-Time Reinforcement Learning Foundations](15-discrete-time-reinforcement-learning-foundations.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 16: Policy Gradient Fundamentals](16-policy-gradient-fundamentals.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 17: REINFORCE and Variance Reduction](17-reinforce-and-variance-reduction.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 18: Actor--Critic and Advanced Policy Optimization](18-actor-critic-and-advanced-policy-optimization.qmd)<br>
[Lecture 19: Reinforcement Learning for Robot Control](19-reinforcement-learning-for-robot-control.qmd)<br>

### Foundation Models for Robotics {.unnumbered}
[Lecture 20: Vision-Language-Action Models, World Models, and Robot Foundation Models](20-vla-world-models-and-robot-foundation-models.qmd)<br>
:::
